name: Mexicali Pizza
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces dark red kidney beans, drained and washed
2 cups low-fat Monterey Jack cheese, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. To prepare sauce, heat olive oil in a skillet. Cook mushrooms, peppers, and onions until tender.
3. Add tomatoes, tomato sauce, pizza seasoning, salt, sugar, oregano, basil, and black pepper to the skillet. Stir well.
4. Simmer all ingredients together for 15 minutes, or until bubbling.
5. Spoon about 1½ tablespoons of sauce onto each toasted English muffin half.
6. Evenly top with beans, remaining onions, bell peppers, tortilla chips, and grated cheese.
7. Sprinkle chili powder over the pizza.
8. Bake for 12 minutes, or until heated through.
